title: PerSpec Recipe File
description: User-authored composition of SCENE primitives with {{param}} substitution. Invoked via the ApplyRecipe action. Package-specific patterns (Flexalon cards, Normcore rooms, etc.) live in user recipes — NOT in UnityHelper core.

name.description: Recipe identifier; conventionally matches the file name stem (e.g. 'wireframe-card' for wireframe-card.recipe.json).

params.description: Required parameter names. When ApplyRecipe is invoked, the caller must supply every name listed here. Unresolved {{param}} tokens in the body cause the task to fail.

tasks.description: Sequence of SCENE primitive actions to execute. Each task body may contain {{param}} tokens that the ApplyRecipe loader substitutes before parsing.
